# CreativeIQ Marketing

> AI-powered digital marketing agency based in San Antonio, Texas. Specializing in AI-ready SEO, websites, CRM automation, and social media systems that convert.

## Services
- Website & SEO systems: technical SEO, on-page, local SEO, AI/GEO readiness
- Social content packages: strategy, posting, captions, cross-platform formatting
- Consulting: growth strategy, neuromarketing, AI ecosystems
- CRM automation: GoHighLevel setup, workflows, lead nurturing

- Free AI SEO Audit Tool: https://creativeiq.marketing/free-ai-seo-audit
- Services Overview: https://creativeiq.marketing/services
- Book a strategy call: https://creativeiq.marketing/book

## About
CreativeIQ builds marketing systems that earn trust from customers and AI platforms. Founded by Vilma Tovar. Serves businesses in San Antonio and nationwide with transparent reporting, technical depth, and measurable growth.
